metadata.job_summary: 2-4 year experience M&A role at ECOM (commodities trading company) in Switzerland, supporting senior managers on deal origination, valuation, due diligence, and post-merger integration across strategic transactions including acquisitions, divestitures, and JVs.

research.company_mission: Responsibly sourcing commodities for 175+ years, helping secure the long-term future of coffee, cocoa, cotton, nuts and ingredients through transparent, sustainable supply chains.
research.recent_news: In 2025, IFC provided $250M financing to ECOM for operations; ADB extended $100M loan for environmental sustainability in coffee milling. DM Brasil joint venture launched in September 2025 with San Roke Industrial for decaffeinated coffee.

resume.professional_summary: Deal execution-focused MSc Finance candidate with end-to-end transaction experience across valuation, due diligence, and closing in a lean team environment. Strong financial modeling expertise (LBO, DCF, comps) and cross-border deal coordination across Europe. Proven project management skills handling multiple concurrent mandates with external advisors.
auraia_bullets: End-to-end execution exposure in a lean 3-person deal team: sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, and closing on 10+ live mandates across healthcare, tech, and life sciences with deal values from EUR 5M to EUR 50M

Built detailed financial models (LBO, DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and prepared investment memoranda and client presentations for Board meetings and investor pitches across multiple concurrent mandates

Coordinated with legal, tax, and accounting advisors to structure transactions and negotiate deal terms, managing data rooms and ensuring alignment across all stakeholders throughout the transaction lifecycle
resume.rc_bullet: Prepared investment memos including market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 potential acquisitions, working directly with the CEO of Healthcare and Retail divisions on evaluating targets in France and Belgium with revenues of EUR 10M-30M
resume.europ_bullet: Supported CFO and Head of Controlling on FP&A and strategic projects for Swiss subsidiary (CHF 50M+ revenues), preparing Board presentations on financial performance and building automated Excel dashboards to track KPIs and perform variance analysis
leadership_bullets: McKinsey Case Finalist: Presented strategic project to Keyrock's management and McKinsey consultants, developing data-driven model showcasing CHF 200K annual revenue potential
Screeny.ai Founder: Built AI-driven buyer identification tool for investment banks, reducing search time from 10h+ to 20min; adopted by 3 advisory firms
Portfolio Manager: Manages diversified investment portfolio using options strategies, generating +8% annualized returns through disciplined risk management
resume.courses: Corporate Governance and M&A, Valuation, Corporate Finance, Derivatives
resume.skills: Financial Modeling, Valuation, M&A Execution, Due Diligence, Project Management

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Corporate Development Junior Manager Position
cover_letter.intro: ECOM's 175-year commitment to responsible commodity sourcing - recently reinforced by $350M in financing from the IFC and ADB for sustainability initiatives - reflects a long-term vision that aligns with my approach to value creation. The opportunity to support strategic M&A and capital investments within this origin-integrated framework is compelling.
cover_letter.body_1: **End-to-End M&A Execution** - At Auraia Capital, I gained comprehensive deal exposure in a lean 3-person team, managing mandates from origination through closing. I led valuation analyses, coordinated due diligence across legal, tax, and financial workstreams, and prepared investment memoranda for Board presentations on transactions ranging from EUR 5M to EUR 50M.
cover_letter.body_2: **Financial Modelling and Strategic Analysis** - I have built LBO, DCF, and precedent transaction models across healthcare, tech, and financial services sectors. At RC Group, I worked directly with divisional CEOs on acquisition evaluations, preparing investment memos with market analysis and financial projections for targets with revenues of EUR 10M-30M.
cover_letter.body_3: **Cross-Functional Coordination** - Managing multiple concurrent mandates requires rigorous project management. I have coordinated data rooms, liaised with external advisors, and ensured alignment across stakeholders throughout transaction lifecycles. My experience navigating complex deal structures across Europe prepares me for ECOM's international operations.
cover_letter.closing: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to ECOM's corporate development initiatives and support the strategic growth of your commodities business. I am available to discuss how my M&A experience can add value to your team.

email.subject: Application - Corporate Development Junior Manager - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Corporate Development Junior Manager position at ECOM.

ECOM's 175-year legacy in responsible commodity sourcing and recent $350M financing for sustainability initiatives reflect a long-term strategic vision. I am eager to support your M&A and capital investment activities, bringing end-to-end transaction experience from a lean deal team where I managed valuations, due diligence, and stakeholder coordination.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
